name: ast-index
description: Fast structural code search for multi-language projects using the ast-index CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Fast structural code search for AI coding agents.
interface.longDescription: Guides agents to use ast-index for file, symbol, usage, hierarchy, dependency, and project-map queries before falling back to broad text search.
defaultPrompt: Use ast-index to find usages of a symbol before editing it.
Use ast-index to map the project structure before planning a large change.
Use ast-index outline before reading a large source file.
